---
name: Bug Report
about: Please use this template not the blank one...
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

**Checks**
Please check that the adapter is working and that ebusd is able to reach it, check also that all the config files are in the right place, I can't troubleshoot wiring or installation problems

**System description**
Please provide:
- description of the HVAC system configuration with at lease HP/Boiler make and model, bus connected device list (internal modules, remote controls, wifi GW etc)
- adapter type and ebusd installation type (addon/docker etc)

**Minimum logs set**
To help troubleshoot a problem the output of these commands
1. ebusctl info
2. ebusctl find
3. ebusctl grab result all

**Problem description**
Please list here what you'd like to solve (missing all params, missing specific item etc)
